author: test-helpers-consolidation <t@t.com>
body:
## Findings

Moved into `crates/jjf/tests/common/mod.rs`: `JJF_BIN`, `scratch`,
`make_jj_repo`, `make_initialized_repo`, `run_jjf`,
`run_jjf_with_stdin`, `parse_id_from_stdout` (unified to return
`IssueId`), `parse_envelope`. Deletes were larger than expected
once `JJF_BIN`/`scratch`/`run_jjf` got pulled in too (ticket
flagged `parse_id_from_stdout` but the audit found 6 more 2+-
duplicated helpers).

Net: 26 files touched, +194/-1497 lines. Single build, no warnings;
all 638 workspace tests green.

Audit also surfaced the divergent variants that must STAY local:
`push_pull`'s namespaced `scratch` (prepends `push_pull_`),
`comment`/`concurrent_write`'s `make_jj_repo` that pins
`jj user.name/email` for hermetic author tests, `claim`/`actor`'s
`_with_user(Option<&str>)` variants, and `new.rs`'s
plain-stdout `parse_id_from_stdout` (renamed to
`parse_id_from_plain_stdout` to clear the name).

`parse_id_from_stdout` consolidated to JSON form returning
`IssueId`; only one call site (`search.rs` line 251) needed the
`&epic_id` -> `epic_id.as_str()` tweak; ls.rs and ready.rs already
used `.as_str()`.

## Recommendation

Close. Acceptance criteria met: single definition of each
previously-duplicated helper, no `[[test]]` warnings on the
`common` module (verified: no `common-*` artifact in
`target/debug/deps/`), tests stay green. Commit `c04126bc`.

## Confidence

High. Behavior preservation verified by full `cargo nextest`
sweep; the only signature change (`parse_id_from_stdout` returning
`IssueId` everywhere) is exercised by 14 callsites across
`ls/ready/search` and they all pass.

## Open follow-ups

None blocking. Future tickets that want `create_issue` shared
would need to land a real signature decision first — it has 4
distinct shapes across the suite (some with body bytes, some
without; some return JSON-id, some return plain-id), so the
"pick one and rewrite assertions" call is bigger than this
ticket's scope.
